---
title: "instrukcja"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{instrukcja}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(ProjektR)
```

```{r exampeles}
analizuj_zarobki(dane_it, "Developer")
porownaj_doswiadczenie(dane_it, "Analyst")
```
